metadata.note: Replace `datastore` with your `makcom_ads_config` id. Record `config` should hold: tenant_id, make_secret, api_base, meta_ad_account_id

Insert (between modules 2 and 99): (3) Facebook Marketing API → Make API Call. URL: /v22.0/{{2.meta_ad_account_id}}/insights ; method=GET ; querystring level=campaign, time_range={"since":"{{1.yesterday}}","until":"{{1.yesterday}}"}, fields=campaign_id,campaign_name,objective,account_id,account_name,impressions,clicks,spend,cpm,cpc,ctr,actions,action_values. (4) Iterator over [3].data. (5) Set variables to extract omni_purchases, omni_purchase_value, omni_add_to_cart, omni_initiated_checkout from {{4.actions}} / {{4.action_values}}. (6) Array aggregator over (4)+(5) building objects matching MetaCampaignDailyRow schema. Then replace {{REPLACE_WITH_ARRAY_AGGREGATOR_OUTPUT}} above with {{6.array}}.

notes.content:
Phase 1 / Scenario 2: Meta campaign-daily → POST /api/insights/meta/campaign-daily

One row per (campaign, day). CTR returned by Meta is in % (e.g. 1.23 = 1.23%) — divide by 100 for our schema. Use omni_* action_types to match the Tenniix dashboard, not the web-only purchase / add_to_cart.

Body row template (paste into the Array Aggregator's record builder):

{
  "date": "{{1.yesterday}}",
  "account_id": "{{4.account_id}}",
  "account_name": "{{4.account_name}}",
  "campaign_id": "{{4.campaign_id}}",
  "campaign_name": "{{4.campaign_name}}",
  "campaign_objective": "{{4.objective}}",
  "impressions": "{{4.impressions}}",
  "clicks_all": "{{4.clicks}}",
  "spend": "{{4.spend}}",
  "purchases": {{5.omni_purchases}},
  "purchase_conv_value": "{{5.omni_purchase_value}}",
  "adds_to_cart": {{5.omni_add_to_cart}},
  "initiated_checkouts": {{5.omni_initiated_checkout}},
  "cpm": "{{4.cpm}}",
  "cpc_all": "{{4.cpc}}",
  "ctr_all": "{{ 4.ctr / 100 }}",
  "roas": "{{ 5.omni_purchase_value / 4.spend }}"
}
